//: Separate TS config for the Electron main process. Targets Node 22 (Electron 42 bundles Node 22), emits CommonJS (asar + electron-builder are happiest with CJS), and writes to ./dist so electron-builder can scoop it up.
//paths: PGlite ships subpath exports (e.g. @electric-sql/pglite/contrib/pgcrypto) which the classic 'node' resolver can't find — TS reports them as missing even though .d.ts files exist. We map the known subpaths explicitly so we don't have to switch to bundler/node16 resolution (which the rest of this repo doesn't use).
